title: ourisia glandulosa
intro: Ourisia glandulosa, also known as the glandular forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ourisia glandulosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues and infections. Herbal preparations of Ourisia glandulosa typically involve infusions, tinctures, or topical applications of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to create salves, creams, or ointments for skin care and wound treatment.
